description_long: This is a modern, cantilevered wooden chair with a distinctive curved frame and slatted seat and backrest. The chair features elegantly bent wooden elements that form both the armrests and the continuous base, giving it a sleek, flowing silhouette. The seat and backrest are composed of horizontal wooden slats, providing both support and ventilation. The armrests are integrated into the frame, curving smoothly from the backrest to the front legs. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish with visible grain patterns, suggesting a high-quality veneer or solid wood construction. The overall design is reminiscent of classic Bauhaus or Scandinavian styles, making it suitable for stylish urban parks, patios, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, curved wooden chair with slatted seat and backrest, integrated armrests, and a rich dark brown finish. Its flowing, cantilevered frame gives it a sleek and contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elegant, continuous curve of the frame and the integrated armrest, highlighting the cantilevered design.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the horizontal slats of the seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical armrests and open seating area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the curved frame and armrest, emphasizing the chair's balanced, sculptural form.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the full width of the backrest slats and the rounded tops of the frame, with the legs extending backward.
